$schema_note: Material rarity weights for the offchain trait assignment (tools/assign_traits.py). Weights are per-TIER shares of the 9,975 non-honors tokens, split evenly among the tier's materials. Ink selection is uniform within validInks[material]. Background selection within validBackgrounds[material] is POS-biased: a token draws from its category's bias group with probability biasStrength, else uniformly from the whole table (color selection ONLY — system invariant 6: never odds, never gameplay).
